used: hook 0 3 s imagine a whole country disappearing without a single battle story in 1907 the tiny republic of zanzibar s sultan s elephant a 12 ton ivory statue was secretly smuggled aboard a cargo ship bound for london the british thinking it a priceless artifact displayed it at the british museum only in 2023 did researchers match the carving to a forgotten royal decree revealing the elephant was actually a political protest against colonial taxes close so one hidden sculpture helped a vanished sultan voice his defiance still standing silent in a museum today
